summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P4 Cross-Asset Composite Lifecycle. Core functionality operational but weight bounding issue detected - DXY weight (0.049) violates minimum bound of 0.05. All major APIs working: promote, status, snapshot, audit. Vol penalties and confidence factors applied correctly. P3-A/P3-B regression tests all passing (10/10).

critical_bugs.issue: DXY weight (0.049) below minimum bound of 0.05 after normalization
critical_bugs.impact: Violates invariant checks, composite version technically invalid
critical_bugs.root_cause: Bounding applied after normalization instead of before. Raw DXY weight 0.0121 too low due to high vol penalty (0.1051)
critical_bugs.expected_fix: Apply bounding [0.05, 0.90] BEFORE renormalization to guarantee weights >= 0.05

passed_tests: Health Check - TypeScript backend running in FRACTAL_ONLY mode
Cross-Asset Config - Default blend configuration retrieved (BTC:0.5, SPX:0.3, DXY:0.2, rebalanceMode:smart)
Cross-Asset Promote - Composite version cv20260302201759.682 created with parentVersions (BTC:v20260302.201535.088, SPX:v20260302.201435.880, DXY:v20260302.201535.766)
Cross-Asset Status - Lifecycle status shows activeVersion cv20260302201759.682 with weights BTC:70.49%, SPX:24.60%, DXY:4.90%
Cross-Asset Snapshot - Returns composite snapshot with forecast path, parentVersions, and computed weights
Cross-Asset Audit Detection - Correctly detects DXY weight bound violation (0.049 < 0.05 minimum)
Vol Penalties Applied - Vol penalties working: BTC:1.0000, SPX:0.5817, DXY:0.1051 (DXY highest penalty as expected)
Confidence Factors Applied - All confidence factors valid: BTC:0.575, SPX:0.575, DXY:0.575
Weights Sum Validation - Weights sum to 0.9999 (within 0.001 tolerance)
P3-A/P3-B Regression - All 10 lifecycle integration tests passing (SPX and DXY runtime config, promote, status operational)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix weight bounding in composite.weights.ts: Apply bounding [0.05, 0.90] BEFORE renormalization in calculateSmartWeights() function. Current issue: DXY weight 0.049 violates minimum bound due to bounding applied after normalization. Raw DXY weight 0.0121 gets reduced further during normalization.

success_percentage.backend: 89% (8/9 P4 core APIs working, weight bounding issue detected)
